name: ETH Asymmetric Trend Persistence v1
thesis: ETH 4h is the best-fit similar-asset lane for testing trend continuation with asymmetric exit logic where trigger, risk, and exit indicators play different roles. The edge should come from persistence after a structured hold, while asymmetric exits prevent one indicator stack from doing every job.
edge_mechanism: trend persistence with asymmetric exit logic
invalidation_condition: Abort if structure-hold entries are too sparse, if exit asymmetry adds complexity without improving participation, or if continuation fades before the management logic can monetize it.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: A transition into persistence where price holds structure after a breakout and continues, but requires different tools for trigger, stop logic, and exit management.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: When regimes transition, continuation can exist but is often mishandled by symmetric all-or-nothing exits. Separating trigger, stop logic, and exit behavior can preserve edge if persistence is real but uneven.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is a cleaner lane than TAO for testing asymmetric management because the continuation behavior is usually more structured and less erratic.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If the market stays rotational instead of persistent, the trend-continuation thesis will degrade into chop losses.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries are valid but persistence is shorter than expected, reduce runner exposure before tightening the trigger.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; structure hold and ADX persistence are aligned, while RSI is used only for exit decay
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: controlled by broad hold definitions rather than rare breakout spikes

long: Trail 45% size by 0.7 * ATR_14 while RSI_14 >= 52
Exit remaining 20% when RSI_14 falls below 50 or after 9 bars
Emergency time-based de-risk after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.2 * ATR_14
short: Trail 45% size by 0.7 * ATR_14 while RSI_14 <= 48
Exit remaining 20% when RSI_14 rises above 50 or after 9 bars
Emergency time-based de-risk after 4 bars if unrealized gain < 0.2 * ATR_14
